name: field of tall grass
description: I'm in a field of tall grass
hints: A field of tall grass east of the highway ramp. Something may be buried here.
You need a digging tool to uncover what's hidden. The climber's pick from the hardware store works.
DIG with the climber's pick to uncover something buried in the field. First DIG sets a flag, second DIG continues. WEST returns to the highway ramp (room 5).
Get the climber's pick from the hardware store (room 17), then DIG here to find buried items.
notes: Field of tall grass east of the highway ramp. DIG with the climber's pick reveals something buried. First DIG sets flag 26. WEST returns to highway ramp (room 5).
